data.title: A Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled Efficacy and Safety Study of Dupilumab, in Chinese Adult Participants With Chronic Rhinosinusitis With Nasal Polyposis (CRSwNP) on a Background Therapy With Intranasal Corticosteroids
data.brief_summary:
This is a parallel group, Phase 3, 2-arm study for treatment. The purpose of this study is to evaluate dupilumab subcutaneous (SC) injections compared to placebo in Chinese adult participants with CRSwNP, on a background therapy with intranasal corticosteroids (budesonide nasal spray).

Study details include:

* The study duration will be up to 40 weeks.
* The treatment duration will be up to 24 weeks.
* The number of visits will be 7.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Participant must be at least 18 years of age at the time of signing the informed consent
* Participants with bilateral sino-nasal polyposis that despite prior treatment with SCS anytime within the past 2 years; and/or who have a medical contraindication/intolerance to SCS; and
endpoints: Change From Baseline in Nasal Polyps Score at Week 24
